data.name: Katana
data.description: A katana made out of regular steel, something a beginner samurai would pick.

Z.name: Quiet Rush
Z.description: The user dashes forward, swiftly attacking enemies in their path in a teleportation-like fashion.

X.name: Air Slash
X.description: The user slashes through the air, unleashing a short-range air slash that strikes all enemies in its path, forcefully knocking them back.
